description: Style NoteEvery item of clothing requires a different kind of innerwear to give the best comfort and the right look. enamor specialises in customised innerwear which will ensure a good overall look for you and lasting comfort throughout the day. And no need to compromise on the trendy look and style of your innerwear either, Enamor is your go to brand for the innerwear that takes care of all your requirements. Product DetailsDusky pink medium coverage underwired camisole brassiere, has moulded and padded cups to provide a smooth look, a rich floral lace panel on the cups that extends above, adjustable straps and a double hook and eye adjustable strap at the back for optimum FitMaterial and Care86% nylon and 14% elasticHand washDo not iron or bleachDrip dry Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
